texto: From the computer screen you learn and have fun with games, but in a world to show you truly are you have to show your potents. The rustling books of pages to be read is a fabulous thing but if you don't like books it becomes truely horrible.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a caterina jester: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “From the computer screen you learn and have fun with games, but in a world to show you truly are …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, harry-potter, books pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
